# Left PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 149.623 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 0.3500
  biquad b0=1.00479892355 b1=-1.97663982678 b2=0.971935685886 a1=-1.97663982678 a2=0.976734609435

  biquad b0=1.00495001833 b1=-1.97589530412 b2=0.971052077046 a1=-1.97589530412 a2=0.976002095372

  biquad b0=1.07078042181 b1=-1.62940942558 b2=0.586073007743 a1=-1.62940942558 a2=0.656853429552

  biquad b0=1.00495637071 b1=-1.97585059485 b2=0.971014928028 a1=-1.97585059485 a2=0.975971298737
